vBRIEFInfo.description: Remove RC-specific safety banner from README.md (Option A). Optionally move a distilled upgrade-safety paragraph to UPGRADING.md.

plan.title: release(v0.20.0): remove or revise RC testing safety banner from README before cutting final

narratives.Problem: README.md carries a v0.20.0 RC-specific safety banner telling testers to run task migrate:vbrief against a fork or copy. Correct today, cosmetically wrong and misleading the moment v0.20.0 final ships. Must be handled before tag cut.
narratives.Action: Option A: remove the RC banner entirely from README.md (line 23 block). Option C (compatible): move a short generic "test on a fork or copy first" paragraph to UPGRADING.md under the v0.20 section so upgrade-safety advice is preserved without RC-specific language. Remove any other "we are still refining" language across README.
narratives.Test: grep README.md for "release-candidate testers" yields no match. verify:links passes. Any content test that previously asserted banner presence is updated or removed.
narratives.Outcome: README.md has no RC-specific language. UPGRADING.md covers any retained upgrade-safety advice. PR 403 release-checklist item #429 satisfied.

items.title: Remove RC testing safety banner block from README.md
(Option C) Add test-on-fork-first paragraph to UPGRADING.md v0.20 section
Search repo for "we are still refining" / similar RC-only language and remove
Run verify:links; confirm no broken internal links
Update or remove any content test asserting banner presence
